desc: and Agrippina II Denarius. Struck 54 AD, Lyons mint. AGRIPP AVG DIVI CLAVD NERONIS CAES MATER, confronted heads of Nero and Agrippina, Nero is bare-headed facing right, Agrippina i
and Agrippina Jr Denarius. 55 AD. NERO CLAUD DIVI F CAES AVG GERM IMP TR P COS, jugate busts of Nero and Agrippina / AGRIPP AVG DIVI CLAVD NERONIS CAES MATER, quadriga of elephants
AR Denarius. 56-57 AD. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP Bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P COS III P P around oak wreath containing EX S C. RSC 207. Text
Denarius. 60 AD. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP, bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P VII COS IIII P P around wreath of oak leaves, EX SC in centre. RSC 216. Text
(2) Sear 1936 Nero Denarius. 60 AD. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP, bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P VII COS IIII P P around wreath of oak leaves, EX SC in centre. RSC 216. Text
Denarius. 60-61 AD. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP, bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P VII COS IIII EX-SC, Ceres standing left, holding corn ears and torch. RSC 218. Text
AR Denarius. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP, bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P VII COS IIII P P EX S C, Virtus standing left, foot on pile of arms, holding parazonium and spear. RSC 220. Text
AR denarius. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP, bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P VII COS IIII P P, EX - SC across fields, Roma standing right, inscribing round shield. Text
Denarius. Lugdunum, AD 61-62. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP, bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P VIII COS IIII EX-SC, Ceres standing left, holding corn ears and torch. BMC 32. Text
AR Denarius. 61-AD 62. NERO CAESAR AVG IMP, bare head right / PONTIF MAX TR P VIII COS IIII P P EX-SC, Virtus standing left, foot on pile of arms, holding parazonium and spear. RSC

Denarius. NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS, laureate head right / AVGVSTVS AVGVSTA, Nero, radiate, standing left holding patera and sceptre; to right, Empress Poppaea standing left holding pat
Denarius. Rome Mint. NERO CAESAR, laureate head right. / AVGVSTVS GERMANICVS, radiate and togate statue of the emperor standing front, holding branch and Victory on globe. RSC 45.
AR denarius. AD 64-65. Rome Mint. NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS, Laureate head right / CONCORDIA AVGVSTA, Concordia seated left, holding patera and cornucopiae. RIC I 49; RSC 67; Sear 1942.
AR denarius. 64-65 AD, Rome. 3.34 g. NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS, laureate head right / IVPPITER CVSTOS, Jupiter seated left, holding thunderbolt and sceptre. RIC 53. RSC 119. BMC 74. CBN
denarius. Rome Mint, NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS Laureate head right. / Roma seated left, holding Victory, ROMA in exergue. RSC 258; BMC 83. Text
AR denarius. NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS, Bare head right / AVGVSTVS AVGVSTA Radiate figure of Nero and figure of Poppaea standing. RSC 43. Text
denarius. Rome Mint, NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS Laureate head right / Salus seated left, holding patera, SALVS in exergue. Text
Denarius. NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS, laureate head right / VESTA, hexastyle temple of Vesta with domed roof and statue of Vesta within. RSC 335. Text
Denarius. Struck circa AD 66-67. IMP NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS, laureate head right / IVPPITER CVSTOS, Jupiter seated left, holding thunderbolt and sceptre. RSC 121. Text
Denarius. Laureate and bearded head of Nero right; IMP NERO CAESAR AVGVSTVS / Salus draped, seated left on throne, holding patera, SALVS in exergue. RSC 258. Text Text
AR Denarius. Struck 67-68 AD. IMP NERO CAESAR AVG P P, laureate head right / No legend, legionary eagle between two standards. RSC 356. Text

RIC 71, Aureus Nero Denarius. IMP NERO CAESAR AVG P P, Laureate head right / SALVS (in exergue), Salus draped seated left on throne; right hand holding patera, left resting at her
Denarius. IMP NERO CAESAR AVG P P, Laureate head right / Salus seated left, holding patera, SALVS in ex. BMC 98. Text
Denarius. IMP NERO CAESAR AVG PP, laureate head right / SA-LVS to either side of Salus seated left holding patera. RSC 320. Text

RIC 79[claudius] Sear 1918 Nero Denarius, as Caesar. 50-59 AD. Struck under Claudius. NERONI CLAVDIO DRVSO GERM COS DESIGN, bare-headed, draped bust right / EQVESTER-OR DO-PRINCIPI
